solutions.title: Solution (vovuh)
solutions.content:
import
java
.
util
.*

{
val

split
(

it
.
toInt
()

val a

readLine
()!!.
split
(
" "
).
map
{
it
.
toInt
()

var
l
=
0L
var

=

*
1000
*

*
1000
var

=
-
1L

(
sum
:

:

{
var

=

var

=

var
cur
=

<
Int
>(

<

in

cursum

[

cur
.

(

[

.

||
cursum

cursum
-=

.
first
()
cur
.

+=
1

if
(

.
size
==
x

=
0L
cur
.

()

return

<=

while
(
l
<=
r

val mid
=
(

+

/
2
if
(

(
mid
))
{

=
mid
            r
=
mid

=

+
